videos.headline: Stanford's first play of the season goes for long run
videos.description: Bryce Love breaks away from defenders for a 62-yard run.

videos.headline: Love extends Stanford lead with rushing TD
videos.description: Bryce Love runs right up the middle for a 10-yard touchdown, extending the Cardinal's lead to 21-0.

videos.headline: Scarlett's second TD keeps Stanford rolling
videos.description: Cameron Scarlett's 29-yard touchdown continues Stanford's rout of Rice.

videos.headline: Scarlett makes juggling catch for big gain
videos.description: Cameron Scarlett keeps his eye on the ball for a 56-yard catch.

videos.headline: Chryst uses back-shoulder pass for Stanford TD
videos.description: Keller Chryst passes it up to Colby Parkinson for the opening touchdown.

videos.headline: Stanford punches it in for TD
videos.description: Cameron Scarlett powers up the middle to extend Stanford's lead.

videos.headline: Scarlett's big game continues as he scores 3rd TD
videos.description: Cameron Scarlett runs up the middle for the 1-yard touchdown, giving him 3 in the first half.

videos.headline: Stanford continues to dominate with passing TD
videos.description: Keller Chryst hits Colby Parkinson for his second touchdown of the game.

videos.headline: Stanford scores easy TD on play-action pass
videos.description: Ryan Burns connects with Kaden Smith for a 3-yard touchdown pass.

videos.headline: Shaw happy with Stanford's first-half performance
videos.description: Stanford coach David Shaw says he is pleased  his team's effort.

videos.headline: Stanford's running game powers them to big win
videos.description: Big performances by Bryce Love and Cameron Scarlett lead Stanford to a 62-7 victory over Rice.
